name: Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add eggs, cocoa, red food coloring, and vanilla; beat until well combined.
3. Alternately stir in the mixture of flour and salt with buttermilk.
4. Mix baking soda and vinegar quickly into the batter while still foaming.
5. Pour the batter into two 8-inch layer pans or one 13x9x2 pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-35 minutes.
Frosting:
1. Combine flour and milk; cook until thickened, then allow to cool.
2. Add butter, sugar, and vanilla; beat well until smooth.
